help.stdout:
labflow <command> [options]

Stable command surface:
- init [implemented-minimal] :: bootstrap .labflow workspace state files in the current directory
- task [implemented-minimal] :: add, list, and complete lightweight workspace tasks
- session [implemented-minimal] :: start, inspect, and close the active workspace session
- memory [implemented-minimal] :: append notes and inspect workspace memory state
- status [implemented-minimal] :: report workspace state, command readiness, and proof visibility
- doctor [implemented] :: print canonical identity and detect known legacy binaries

Current repo phase:
- Phase 2 — Minimal stable-core implementation
- Public npm / npx install is intentionally disabled until publish readiness is proven.
